text: delegate codex lanes failed twice mid-build (work-account quota, then an expired restored token) but both surfaced as generic harness_error; a quota/auth-specific failure reason would have saved ~30 minutes of diagnosis

Claude Code persistent Bash-tool shell runs Homebrew bash with BASH_ENV set in env, but agent.sh was not sourced: PATH lacks gnubin so sed/awk resolve to BSD /usr/bin. Same file works under a fresh 'bash -c'. Wave 1 acceptance shape (bash -c) passes; the persistent-shell shape needs its own acceptance row or a login-shell profile hook.
